metric_definitions.model_residency_bytes: Unique physical model/runtime allocation from the engine memory plan; AOT counts MRAM cold constant source once and does not double-count its hydrated DTCM destination.
metric_definitions.binary_total_bytes: arm-none-eabi-size total of text+data+bss; includes firmware/runtime overhead and reserved no-load storage.
metric_definitions.linker_regions: Section-level placement from the linker map; heap values are reserved capacity, not measured live high-water allocation.
metric_definitions.aot_memory_layers: Per-tensor/layer placement, liveness, offsets, sizes, and staged constant source/destination details.
metric_definitions.future_kernel_breakdown: Aggregate linker map object/archive sizes into interpreter, optimized kernels, profiling, transport, and application categories.

notes: Dedicated power firmware used for both runs.
AP330 JS110 run used true 3-wire lockstep with J8 GP5/GP6/GP7.
AOT constants remain in MRAM as the cold source and are hydrated into DTCM.
Runtime model residency excludes firmware code/data/bss; binary_total_bytes is reported separately.
